name: audio-tts-openai
description: OpenAI Text-to-Speech proxy. Exposes POST /v1/tts/openai which forwards { text, voice?, model?, format? } to https://api.openai.com/v1/audio/speech using the OpenAI provider's api_key from bridge config. Streams the audio response back unchanged. Disabling this module removes the OpenAI option from VoiceMode's TTS picker — the frontend falls back to BrowserTTS.
